name: 갑수
visual_description: 갑수 (Gap-soo) appears disheveled and anxious. He is likely in his late 50s. His clothes are simple and worn, perhaps an old, faded shirt and pants. His face shows worry and desperation, with tired eyes and maybe some stubble. His hair is thinning and unkempt.
consistency_prompt: Middle-aged Korean man with worried expression, wearing simple, worn clothes.
